name: Spiced Almond Meringues
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Grind almonds or buy already ground.
2. Grease a cookie sheet generously with 1 tablespoon butter or solid margarine.
3. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the egg white and a pinch of cream of tartar; beat until foamy.
5. Gradually add sugar and cinnamon to the egg white mixture, beating until stiff peaks form. Fold in the ground almonds.
6. Drop by level tablespoons 2 inches apart on the cookie sheet. Cookies spread during baking, so don't place them too close together.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until cookies are a pale beige color.
